# My Project

**Project:** My Project
**Type:** song
**Status:** active
**Created:** 2024-01-01

## What This Is

A simple test project used for round-trip parsing verification.

## Direction

Acoustic folk with electronic elements.

## Key Decisions

### Use acoustic instruments first

**WHAT:** Record all instruments acoustically before adding electronic processing.

**WHY:** Preserves organic feel.

**WHEN:** 2024-01-01

## Open Questions

### To Resolve

  **Options:** 80 BPM / 100 BPM / 120 BPM
  **Impact:** Affects the overall energy level of the project.
